_note: Canonical UC comment content for WellView Silver tables. The MASTER UNIT of each numeric column lives in its column comment so Genie sees it on DESCRIBE. Resolve physical names + confirm units per customer before applying. Bind :catalog.:silver_schema. Apply ONLY via apply_uc_comments.py --apply, gated on explicit approval.

WVWELLHEADER.comment: WellView well master. One row per well. IDREC = IDWELL (the well-level GUID carried on every descendant row).

columns.IDREC: Primary key (GUID). Equals IDWELL at the well level.
columns.IDWELL: Well GUID; denormalized onto every descendant row. Use to FILTER to a well, not to relate rows.

WVJOB.comment: Job: a discrete operation campaign on a well (drilling, completion, workover, P&A). A well has MANY jobs — group cost/footage/days by IDREC before rolling to the well.

columns.IDREC: Primary key (GUID). The roll-up grain for daily-ops/cost.
columns.JOBTYPE: Job type code; decode via LVWVTYPEJOB (Drilling/Completion/Workover/P&A).

WVJOBREPORT.comment: Daily operations report. One row per day per job. Child of WVJOB via IDRECPARENT.

columns.IDREC: Primary key (GUID). Parent of the time log and (per install) cost lines.
columns.DEPTHMD: Measured depth at 24:00. MASTER UNIT: <feet|metres> — CONFIRM via SYSUNIT.
columns.DAYSFROMSPUD: Days since spud. May be a calc-engine output (not stored) — recompute if NULL.

WVJOBREPORTOP.comment: Operations time log. One row per activity within a report-day. Child of WVJOBREPORT via IDRECPARENT. Hours should reconcile to ~24/day.

columns.PHASE: Hole section / phase code; decode via LVWVPHASE.
columns.CODENPT: NPT reason code; decode via LVWVCODENPT. NPT rule is customer-specific.
columns.DEPTHSTART: Depth at activity start. MASTER UNIT: <feet|metres> — CONFIRM.
columns.DEPTHEND: Depth at activity end. Footage = DEPTHEND - DEPTHSTART (same unit).

WVCOST.comment: Cost lines. Parentage is report or job per install — CONFIRM. Roll up by job (WVJOB.IDREC).

columns.IDRECPARENT: FK to WVJOBREPORT.IDREC or WVJOB.IDREC — CONFIRM per install.
columns.CODECOST: Cost code; decode + rollup via LVWVCODECOST.
columns.AMOUNT: Cost amount. MASTER UNIT: currency = <CCY> — CONFIRM. Don't sum across currencies.

WVAFE.comment: AFE (Authorization for Expenditure) header, child of WVJOB. AFEs allocate many-to-many across jobs/wells (WVAFEDETAIL %) — de-dup before variance.

columns.AFEAMOUNT: Authorized amount. Confirm baseline (original vs supplement). MASTER UNIT: currency.
